channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce
item.description: "Without a workforce initiative, it is hard to see the workforce having the tools to take the risks the legislation wants them to take,” Stan Soloway said. The post NDAA scales back ambitious acquisition reforms, offers little on workforce first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: The 14 global trends that will shape the climate in 2026
item.description: The future of the energy transition is being shaped by President Donald Trump’s climate policy rollbacks that favor fossil fuels — but also the life support for renewables and batteries paradoxically coming from data center power demand.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Grok makes sexual images of kids as users test AI guardrails
item.description: Elon Musk's artificial intelligence chatbot Grok created sexualized images of minors on the social media platform X in response to user prompts in recent days, drawing criticism of a tool that positions itself as less restrained than its competition.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: One UI 8.5 leaks show off Samsung's new Privacy Display feature for phones, and Bixby powered by Perplexity AI
item.description: A major software update for Samsung phones is on the way, and we just got a preview of two of its new features.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn AI advances could lead to 200,000 banking jobs being cut this year
item.description: European banking workers could be at risk of redundancy due to AI after years of job cuts from store closures.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn PC prices could rise even more in 2026 as RAM costs set to soar higher
item.description: PCs and smartphones could become far more expensive from the second half of 2026 due to memory shortages, experts warn.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Space X plans to lower Starlink satellites’ orbital altitude
item.description: Space X plans to lower the orbit of all Starlink satellites in 2026, Reuters reports. According to the private space company’s chief technology officer Michael Nicolls, the orbit of the satellites will be lowered from about 550 to 480 kilometers. The aim is to increase safety in space.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NIH wants 1 million Americans for a study
item.description: "We don't normally rank our findings, but access controls tend to drift to the top because that is the gate to the system," Charles Summers said. The post NIH wants 1 million Americans for a study — but first must close critical data security gaps first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: FAA ramps up billions in spending as ‘down payment’ for air traffic overhaul
item.description: The agency expects to spend more than $6 billion this year to lay the groundwork for a complete overhaul of the rapidly aging air traffic control system. The post FAA ramps up billions in spending as ‘down payment’ for air traffic overhaul first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: AI agents 2025 recap: What happened and what to expect next year
item.description: In artificial intelligence, 2025 marked a decisive shift. Systems once confined to research labs and prototypes began to appear as everyday tools. At the center of this transition was the rise of AI agents—AI systems that can use other software tools and act on their own.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service
item.description: "It's so important not to get caught up and react to the moment, but to be reflective, smart and strategic, and to respond in the moment," Kshemendra Paul said. The post From DOJ to VA, Kshemendra Paul’s journey exemplifies lasting public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: How to build RAG at scale
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has quickly become the enterprise default for grounding generative AI in internal knowledge. It promises less hallucination, more accuracy, and a way to unlock value from decades of documents, policies, tickets, and institutional memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 22 tech luminaries we lost in 2025
item.description: As modern technologies such as artificial intelligence grab today’s headlines, it’s worth remembering that their foundations were being laid more than half a century ago by computer scientists, philosophers, psychologists, developers, entrepreneurs, and more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI looks for a new head of AI preparedness
item.description: OpenAI has announced that it is looking for a new Head of Preparedness, who will be responsible for anticipating and mitigating the risks and damages that its AI models can cause. As compensation, OpenAI is offering around $550,000 in annual salary, plus stock.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Here are the best free tools for discovering new music online
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. I love apps like Metronaut and Tomplay, which let me carry a collection of classical (sheet) music on my phone.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI app for finding local food
item.description: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI-powered social app that recommends restaurants through conversational search, now testing in San Francisco and New York.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
